case_title: SELASSIE, AMARE vs. PACIFIC BELL (AKA PACBELL) et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SELASSIE, AMARE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL (AKA PACBELL) NEAL, ROBERT DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-09-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-21-1999

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-18-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-13-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-13-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF SELASSIE AMARE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-28-1999 CONTINUED FROM OCT-13-1999 TO DEC-08-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR AJLOUNY, PETER AS ATTORNEY FOR SELASSIE, AMARE

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-02-2000, TO FILE POS; TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT; TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF SELASSIE AMARE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-17-2000 CONTINUED FROM FEB-02-2000 TO APR-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-05-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-05-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER AMARE SELASSIE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-20-2000 CONTINUED FROM APR-05-2000 TO JUL-26-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-09-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY PETER AJLOUNY. HEARING SET FOR AUG-18-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-08-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-08-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF SELASSIE AMARE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-23-1999 CONTINUED FROM DEC-08-1999 TO FEB-02-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
